title: Korea Cheap Screen Deletion Benchmark for Stock Research Agents
subtitle: A benchmark for testing whether equity research LLMs can delete weak Korean cheap-screen ideas before inventing a thesis.
description: Core survivor stack: Poongsan, BHI, Woojin. Moonshot drawer: Innospace, Mobiis, CellBion, IntoCell, SBB Tech. Research commentary only, not investment advice.
